title: Comparison of Cranial Ultrasound and Amplitude-Integrated Electroencephalography in Predicting Neurodevelopmental Outcomes in Neonates With Hypoxic-Ischemic Encephalopathy: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
abstract: Hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy (HIE) remains a leading cause of neonatal mortality and long-term neurodevelopmental impairment.
